title: pilosella koernickeana subsp. denigrata
intro: Pilosella koernickeana subsp. denigrata, a lesser-known species of the Pilosella genus, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which can be beneficial in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of Pilosella koernickeana subsp. denigrata include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as bloating and gas, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
